Enum Class BidType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<BidType>
whistapp.domain.bids.BidType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<BidType>, Constable
public enum BidType extends Enum<BidType>
Enum for the different types of bids during the bidding phase of the game.

After a player makes a bid, the next player can only make a bid with a higher order, except if the last bid was PASS, MISERIE or OPEN_MISERIE: in those cases, the next player can also make the same bid.

Abondance bids with a free trump choice (ABONDANCE_X) can be superseded by the corresponding ABONDANCE_X_ORIGINAL_TRUMP bid, which plays in the deck's original trump suit. The original-trump variant is harder and therefore ranked higher.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static BidType[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static BidType valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • isValidFinalRoundBid

      public boolean isValidFinalRoundBid()
      A simple getter that determines if a bid can be a round bid.
      Returns:
      true if this bid can be a round bid, false otherwise

    • getBidTypes

      public static BidType[] getBidTypes()
      A simple getter that returns all possible bids a player can make as an array
      Returns:
      all bid types as an array

    • createBidFromBidType

      public Bid createBidFromBidType(ArrayList<Player> declarers)
      A method creating a Bid from a BidType given the declarers of the bid.
      Parameters:
      declarers - The declarers for this bid.
      Returns:
      A Bid object corresponding to the BidType.

    • isHigherBidThan

      public boolean isHigherBidThan(BidType otherBid)
      Checks if the current bid is higher than the given bid.
      Parameters:
      otherBid - The bid to compare with.
      Returns:
      True if the current bid is higher than the given bid, false otherwise.

    • isFreeAbondance

      public boolean isFreeAbondance()
      Returns true if this BidType is a free-trump Abondance variant. By GRASP Information Expert, BidType itself knows about its own category.

    • isOriginalTrumpAbondance

      public boolean isOriginalTrumpAbondance()
      A simple getter that determines if this BidType is an abondance variant with the original trump trait, meaning the round will have the trump of the last dealt card, instead of the first played card.
      Returns:
      true if this BidType is an abondance variant with the original trump trait, false otherwise

    • getOriginalTrumpVariant

      public BidType getOriginalTrumpVariant()
      Finds the corresponding Original Trump variant of a free-trump Abondance bid. Returns the same bid if it's not a free-trump Abondance.

    • getOrder

      public int getOrder()
      A simple getter for the order index of this BidType. A bid cannot be superseded by a bid of a lower order.
      Returns:
      the order of this BidType

    • changesTrumpSuit

      public boolean changesTrumpSuit()
      A simple getter for if this BidType requires a suited trump to be declared at bid time (i.e. Solo). Abondance declares trump at first-card time, not at bid time.
      Returns:
      true if this BidType requires a suited trump to be declared at bid time, false otherwise

    • getAvailableBidTypes

      public static BidType[] getAvailableBidTypes(BidType bid, boolean hasBeenProposed)
      Determines which bids are still available to be played.

      By GRASP Information Expert, BidType knows the hierarchy of bids and the rules of the game, so it is responsible for determining what can be bid next.

      Parameters:
      bid - The current highest bid.
      hasBeenProposed - Whether a PROPOSAL has already been made.
      Returns:
      An array of available BidTypes.

    • fromString

      public static BidType fromString(String string)
      Returns the BidType that will parse to the given string with toString
      Parameters:
      string - the string equal to the BidType youre looking for
      Returns:
      the BidType that matches returnedBidType.toString() == string

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Enum<BidType>
